responsibility: Own the complete responsive, accessible Audit Hub front end and orchestrate workspace selection, Overview, all nine lifecycle areas and their phase-specific subviews, global search, dossiers, trace navigation, baseline comparison, findings, reviews, packages, sample reset, and refresh status through approved capability contracts.

requiredOperations.reason: Resolve workspace, sample fallback, baseline, and revision context.
Run global evidence search and filters.

rules.text: The lifecycle navigation always contains Overview, Planning, Requirements, Design, Implementation, Verification, Configuration Management, Quality Assurance, and Certification in order.
Every lifecycle area uses the shared header, phase subnavigation, visualization, evidence workspace, inspector, findings context, and baseline comparison anatomy.
All authoritative evidence is read-only and every user mutation is routed to hub-local assurance or sample-overlay operations.
Sample status stays visible and every sample export says Synthetic sample — not certification evidence.

acceptanceCases.description: Open the application with no configured project and walk every main lifecycle route.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: AeroNav sample 2.4.0 opens automatically with persistent Sample Data badge, populated phase-specific subviews, working search and dossiers, and no empty placeholders.
The full eight-node system-requirement-to-verification-result chain appears with provenance, gaps, linked findings, and keyboard-accessible inspector actions.

acceptanceCases.description: Compare baselines 2.3.0 and 2.4.0 from Requirements, Design, Implementation, and Verification.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: Added, removed, changed, stale, and impacted evidence remains consistent across phase views.

acceptanceCases.description: Move FND-012 from Ready for Closure through reverification to Closed.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: The UI enforces required evidence and independence, shows immutable history, and updates contextual readiness.

acceptanceCases.description: Build and export the sample Lateral Guidance audit package.
acceptanceCases.expectedOutcome: Progress, manifest, hashes, revisions, reviews, findings, and the Synthetic sample — not certification evidence watermark are visible.
